biological_replicate: Two independent clones recovered in this screen encoded a novel tick CKBP, P672.
technical_replicate: All measurements were done in triplicate.
experimental_design: Yeast surface display screening was performed as described previously.
factor_value: Using yeast surface display, we identified a CCL8-binding evasin, P672, from the tick Rhipicephalus pulchellus.
number_of_technical_replicates: All measurements were done in triplicate.
number_of_biological_replicates: Two independent clones recovered in this screen encoded a novel tick CKBP, P672.
number_of_samples: Two independent clones recovered in this screen encoded a novel tick CKBP, P672.
